items.original_title: Alibaba's Qwen takes on Kimi K3 with open-weight Qwen 3.8, says model is "second only to Fable 5"
items.title_en: Alibaba's Qwen takes on Kimi K3 with open-weight Qwen 3.8, says model is "second only to Fable 5"
items.summary_en: Alibaba has unveiled Qwen 3.8, a multimodal AI model with 2.4 trillion parameters that the Qwen team says rivals leading models and trails only Fable 5. A preview is available now. The article Alibaba's Qwen takes on Kimi K3 with open-weight Qwen 3.8, says model is "second only to Fable 5" appeared first on The Decode…
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴Qwen 3.8多模态AI模型发布，力图超越Fable 5
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴推出了多模态AI模型Qwen 3.8，参数达到2.4万亿，声称其实力仅次于Fable 5。

items.original_title: Google Deepmind argues video generators already contain the world models computer vision has been missing
items.title_en: Google Deepmind argues video generators already contain the world models computer vision has been missing
items.summary_en: Google Deepmind's GenCeption repurposes a video generator for classic vision tasks such as depth estimation and segmentation, matching state-of-the-art systems with far less training data. The model trained almost entirely on synthetic videos. Its results add to the debate over whether video generators already contain…
items.title_zh: 谷歌DeepMind推出GenCeption视频生成模型，解决计算机视觉世界模型缺乏的问题
items.summary_zh: 谷歌DeepMind的GenCeption模型通过视频生成技术实现经典计算机视觉任务，显著减少训练数据需求。

items.original_title: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
items.title_en: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
items.summary_en: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether Apple's lawsuit will cast over OpenAi's much-discussed plans to get into hardware and go public.
items.title_zh: 苹果诉讼是否会影响OpenAI的硬件计划？
items.summary_zh: 苹果的诉讼可能对OpenAI的硬件计划造成影响，引发业界热议。

items.original_title: ‘Odyssey’ director Christopher Nolan calls AI an obvious ‘Trojan horse’
items.title_en: ‘Odyssey’ director Christopher Nolan calls AI an obvious ‘Trojan horse’
items.title_zh: 诺兰称AI为“特洛伊木马”，引发对AI影响的讨论
items.summary_zh: 《奥德赛》导演克里斯托弗·诺兰称AI为明显的“特洛伊木马”，引发对AI潜在影响的思考。

items.original_title: Nonprofit Current AI is racing to build the World Wide Web of AI, free for all
items.title_en: Nonprofit Current AI is racing to build the World Wide Web of AI, free for all
items.summary_en: Current AI, a non-profit building AI that leaves no one culture behind, has made remarkable progress across devices, AI chat and more.
items.title_zh: 非营利组织Current AI致力于全球AI建设，推动免费技术普及
items.summary_zh: 非营利组织Current AI致力于构建无文化遗漏的全球AI网络，取得显著进展。

items.summary_zh: 新发布的ICM架构设计工具能够将任何过程或问题转为工作空间，提升项目管理效率。

items.summary_en: Open-source AI coding agent for the terminal. Claude Code-grade accuracy with smart model routing — uses the right AI model for each task, cutting costs 10x. Supports Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek & more. GitHub: 148 stars, 23 forks.
